parameters.name: seed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: Numerical value that initializes the randomization.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Method
parameters.description: How to sprinkle points - on peimitives like triangles/quads, or inside closed volumes formed by primitives like triangles/quads.

parameters.name: numpoints
parameters.label: Number of Points
parameters.description: Sets the number of points. In the case of volume sprinkle, this is the max number of points, it might require a higher number of attempts per point to reach it.

parameters.name: attemptsperpoint
parameters.label: Attempts per Point
parameters.description: For volume sprinkle, the number of attempts to try to get a point inside the mesh.

parameters.name: pointattrscope
parameters.label: Point Attribute Scope
parameters.description: The Point attribute scope to blend.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

examples.label: Configure Seed and Number of Points
examples.description: Common settings from 10 real Derivative examples
